JUDGE DIANE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR CT. TRIAL, DONALD BLUM APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF, ROBERT CUFF, DEFENDANT, APPEARING IN PRO PER. CASE PROCEEDS, WITNESSES CALLED, TESTIMONY GIVEN AND EVIDENCE PRESENTED. CASE SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUFF, ROBERT SUED AS CLIFF THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1558 CHURCH ST, S.F, CA. 94131 $1,462.50 RENT, $300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $113.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,875.50, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL.
